generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about resilience. While some claim we're turning our backs on allies, the truth is we're ensuring no single disruption can cripple our critical infrastructure. Remember the 2024 cyberattacks that paralyzed European supply chains? That's why we need domestic redundancy in key sectors. #NationalSecurity #ResilientFuture
